Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Travelers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Territories are for Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — The white-haired man has killed Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Human guards ran when they realized Travelers were fighting.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Adessa's actions wasted the lives of six Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Travelers are a common sight in the Damascan royal army camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Travelers are potentially useless against Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Travelers in Avernus escorted Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Other Travelers contended with various threats like giant birds and fireballs.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — Travelers engaged in combat within the camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Travelers can call things from their Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Valinhall is a Territory that exists only to kill other Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — There are Travelers who avoid Grandmasters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Travelers can attack Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Travelers can be waylaid or deceived by Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Leah plans to send parties of Travelers out later.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Leah is standing behind a wall of golems and Travelers.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
